# PDFPing — HTML to PDF API

> Convert HTML or URLs to PDF with a single POST request. Chromium-powered rendering with full CSS, font, and image support. MIT licensed.

## Docs

- [API Reference](https://pdfapi.uhadev.com/docs): Full API docs with endpoints, parameters, code examples (curl, JavaScript, Python), error codes, and rate limits.
- [Landing Page](https://pdfapi.uhadev.com/): Live HTML-to-PDF converter, feature overview, sign in for API key.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Spyboss/pdfping): Source code, self-hosting guide, MIT license.

## Quick Start

Convert HTML to PDF with one curl command:

```
curl -X POST https://pdfapi.uhadev.com/api/v1/convert/public \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ "html": "<h1>Hello World</h1>" }' \
  -o output.pdf
```

Authenticated endpoint (requires API key — get one free at https://pdfapi.uhadev.com):

```
curl -X POST https://pdfapi.uhadev.com/api/v1/convert \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer pdfping_YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ "html": "<h1>Hello World</h1>" }' \
  -o output.pdf
```
